front.prompt: Create a 2D pixel art RPG character design sheet, front view, full body, standing idle pose. The character is a Memory Breaker — a massive heavy warrior in dark fantasy Korean MMORPG style. They wear mixed heavy plate and leather armor with extra-wide shoulder guards and memory surge patterns etched on their arms. They wield a massive two-handed warhammer embedded with glowing memory crystal fragments. Wider body than normal. Colors: gunmetal, blood red, dark gold, with ether blue glowing crack lines. Art style: 512x512 pixel art with clean sharp pixel edges, 2px black outline, no anti-aliasing on borders, 2.5 head-to-body chibi proportions. Transparent background. Top-left 45-degree lighting with 3-step cel shading. Dark fantasy atmosphere with subtle glowing elements. DO NOT include text, watermarks, or 3D effects.

side.prompt: Create a 2D pixel art RPG character design sheet, left-facing side view, full body. The character is a Memory Breaker — a massive heavy warrior in dark fantasy Korean MMORPG style. They wield a massive two-handed warhammer embedded with glowing memory crystal fragments. Wider body than normal. Colors: gunmetal, blood red, dark gold, with ether blue glowing crack lines.
